defaults.change_summary: Recent project changes require documentation/index consistency review.

values.scope: README {readme}, docs directory {docs_dir}, and docs index output from stdin.
values.instructions: Review whether docs navigation, README entrypoints, and changed behavior are coherent. Change summary: {change_summary}
values.output_format: Markdown sections: Missing Links, Stale Docs, Needed Updates, Safe No-op Areas.

values.goal: Prepare a bounded docs maintenance plan for: {change_summary}
values.scope: Use docs index and documentation review from stdin. README: {readme}. Docs dir: {docs_dir}.
values.constraints: Prefer smallest documentation changes; do not rewrite stable docs cosmetically.
values.output_format: Markdown sections: Required Edits, Optional Edits, Validation, Stop Conditions.

values.input: Use docs review and maintenance plan from stdin.
values.artifact_format: Markdown sections: Docs State, Required Updates, Optional Follow-up, Validation.
